REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS TO SUPPORT CONSCIOUS DISREGARD OF TENANT'S RIGHTS (UNABATED CONSTRUCTION NOISE FROM OCTOBER 2022 TO MARCH 2023). WHETHER THESE ALLEGATIONS ARE TRUE IS NOT AN ISSUE TO BE ADDRESSED AT THIS STAGE OF THE LITIGATION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2023 Set For Trial On Aug-05-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT ZEBRA VALLEJO, LP, MONICA ZIMMERMAN, ALAN ZIMMERMAN MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
is DENIED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support conscious disregard of tenant's rights (unabated construction noise from October 2022 to March 2023). Whether these allegations are true is not an issue to be addressed at this stage of the litigation.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Continued To Nov-07-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

RE: DEFENDANTS ZEBRA VALLEJO, LP, MONICA ZIMMERMAN and ALAN ZIMMERMAN's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Transferred to be heard in department 501 on November 7, 2023, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all wrongful eviction cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
